summary: Pattern Rendering Engine v4 testing completed successfully. Backend API returns proper render contracts with boundaries and levels. Frontend renders TA formations correctly with console logs showing '[PatternRenderer] Rendered ascending_triangle: 2 boundaries, 1 levels'. MTF Summary Bar and TF selector working as specified.

design_issues.issue: Some querySelector syntax errors in frontend code causing runtime warnings
WebSocket connection failures (403 errors) but doesn't affect core functionality

passed_tests: pattern_render_contract.render.boundaries contains upper_boundary and lower_boundary with x1,y1,x2,y2
pattern_render_contract.window contains start and end timestamps
Frontend renders boundaries with console logs '[PatternRenderer] Rendered ascending_triangle: 2 boundaries, 1 levels'
MTF Summary Bar shows summary_text: 'Macro: Neutral · Mid-term: Developing · Short-term: Consolidation'
TF selector shows 1M and 6M instead of 30D and 180D
Interpretation panel shows per-TF analysis: '4H ANALYSIS Locally, Ascending Triangle suggests short-term bullish pressure'
Pattern overlay controls working (Pattern, Fibonacci toggles)
Chart renders proper TA formations with boundaries and levels
All API endpoints return 200 status codes
Backend uses research language (no 'no trade', 'invalid' language)
Fibonacci overlay displays retracement levels correctly
